name: 日付の統一
description: 選択した日付列を YYYY-MM-DD 形式へ統一します。和暦の R/H/S/T/M と西暦の区切り表記に対応します。
code:
def transform(row, values):
    text = str(values.get("A", "")).strip()
    if not text:
        return ""

    text = text.replace("年", ".").replace("月", ".").replace("日", "")
    text = text.replace("/", ".").replace("-", ".")
    text = text.replace("．", ".").replace(" ", "")

    match = re.match(r"^([RrHhSsTtMm])(\d{1,2})\.(\d{1,2})\.(\d{1,2})$", text)
    if match:
        era = match.group(1).upper()
        year = int(match.group(2))
        month = int(match.group(3))
        day = int(match.group(4))
        base_years = {"R": 2018, "H": 1988, "S": 1925, "T": 1911, "M": 1867}
        year = base_years[era] + year
        return f"{year:04d}-{month:02d}-{day:02d}"

    match = re.match(r"^(\d{4})\.(\d{1,2})\.(\d{1,2})$", text)
    if match:
        year = int(match.group(1))
        month = int(match.group(2))
        day = int(match.group(3))
        return f"{year:04d}-{month:02d}-{day:02d}"

    match = re.match(r"^(\d{8})$", text)
    if match:
        raw = match.group(1)
        return f"{raw[0:4]}-{raw[4:6]}-{raw[6:8]}"

    return text
